title: Brevo vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and GetResponse: pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
intro: Both Brevo and GetResponse are established email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they cater to different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while GetResponse focuses on course creators and webinar hosts. This comparison will help you decide which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: 5 EUR per free signup + 100 EUR per paid

choose_a_if: You need SMS and WhatsApp marketing alongside email campaigns
You want a larger free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers
You require transactional email API capabilities for your applications
choose_b_if: You host webinars or create and sell online courses
You need landing pages and conversion funnel tools built-in
You're a beginner seeking ease-of-use and lower starting costs

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo is better for multi-channel marketing, CRM, and transactional emails, earning higher ratings (4.5 vs 4.2 on G2). GetResponse excels for webinar hosts and course creators with specialized tools. Brevo's superior overall features and larger free tier make it the better choice for most businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse's paid plans start at $19/month compared to Brevo's $25/month, making it $6 cheaper monthly. However, Brevo's free tier is dramatically larger (100,000 vs 500 subscribers), making it more cost-effective for growing businesses that want to stay free longer.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and imports, making migration possible. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export subscriber lists in standard formats like CSV. You should plan your migration to preserve automation workflows and segment data where applicable.
